# impulsAI

impulsAI is an AI transformation company based in Mexico, serving businesses across Latin America.

## What we do
We design and implement AI systems for mid-size and large companies: process automation, AI agents, predictive analytics, and AI integration with existing ERP/CRM infrastructure. We deliver working systems, not strategy presentations.

## Who we serve
- CEOs, Operations Directors, and Digital Transformation leaders
- Companies with 50–500+ employees
- Industries: manufacturing, retail, logistics, financial services, healthcare, corporate education
- Geography: Mexico and Latin America

## What makes us different
- We deliver working systems, not strategy decks or PowerPoint roadmaps
- Implementation in weeks, not months — first results in 4 weeks
- We integrate with existing infrastructure — no rip-and-replace
- We understand business processes before writing a line of code
- Local team in Latin America with global standards

## Services
1. Process automation — AI agents that handle repetitive operations (reports, follow-ups, validations)
2. Data-driven decisions — predictive analytics for sales, inventory, and customer behavior
3. Infrastructure integration — AI layer on top of existing CRM, ERP, and databases

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://impulsai.mx
- Services: https://impulsai.mx/servicios
- How it works: https://impulsai.mx/proceso
- Pricing: https://impulsai.mx/precios
- Machine-readable pricing: https://impulsai.mx/pricing.md
- Contact: https://impulsai.mx/contacto
